name: Active exploitation reported: Modicon PLC flaw CVE-2024-12345 targeted in the wild
description: Security researchers have confirmed active exploitation of CVE-2024-12345 in Schneider Electric Modicon M340 and M580 PLCs. Threat actors are scanning for exposed Modbus/TCP ports and deploying custom payloads. Utilities and industrial operators running unpatched firmware (< 3.40) are at immediate risk. Emergency patching or network isolation is strongly recommended.
